'''√ng-z-d''' ('''kangazad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debias|debias]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debias|debias]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kangazad
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingazad || jingazad || shingazad || kingazad
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungazad || jujungazad || shushungazad || kukungazad
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungazad || jungazad || shungazad || kungazad
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungazad || jungazad || shungazad || kungazad
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengazad || jengazad || shengazad || kengazad
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongazad || jojongazad || shoshongazad || kokongazad
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongazad || jongazad || shongazad || kongazad
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongazad || jongazad || shongazad || kongazad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad || ngazad
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængazad || jængazad || shængazad || kængazad
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangazad || jajangazad || shashangazad || kakangazad
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangazad || jangazad || shangazad || kangazad
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangazad || jangazad || shangazad || kangazad
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangazad
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangazad
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangazad
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangazadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangazadnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangazadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangazadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangazadnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangazadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangazadro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangazadnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangazadro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangazadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangazadnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangazadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangazadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangazadnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangazadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangazadng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangazadnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangazadng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangazadya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangazadnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangazadya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangazadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangazadnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangazadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangazadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangazadnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangazadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazadnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangazadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazadnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangazadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangazadnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangazadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazadnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangazadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazadnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangazadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangazadnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangazadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangazadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangazadnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangazadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangazadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazadnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangazadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangazadnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangazadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangazadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangazadnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangazadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazadmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazadnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazadmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
